title: Team closeout: Estuarine Fathoming Sail — Sonar PR local apply
body: Team closeout: assessed Sonar agent PRs 99, 103, 104, 105 and applied only still-relevant hunks under packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/bulk. PR 99 was mostly already present; remaining applied hunks came from 103/104/105. Validation passed: pnpm --filter @oaknational/sdk-codegen lint, type-check, test; git diff --check on touched files. Claim 77dcfa0d closed. Changes left unstaged; no commit queue intent opened.
